symptoms: planner: fix the unstable test TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts
failure_signature: planner: fix the unstable test TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts
root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because histogram/statistics building does not guarantee an exact final bucket count, and the previous assertion tolerance was too tight, causing intermittent failures across runs/data distributions. This PR stabilizes it by widening the acceptable bucket-count delta and asserting bucket counts within a range (>= / <=) instead of assuming an almost-exact value.
fix_pattern: Relax histogram bucket-count assertions by widening the tolerance (delta) and checking that bucket counts fall within an expected range.

evidence: evidence: planner: fix the unstable test TestAnalyzeGlobalStatsWithOpts
